failure.message: Modal image checkout is not clean: D .confirmatory/manifests/train_exclusions.json
failure.root_cause: The complete standalone clone correctly retained the tracked, outcome-free train-exclusions manifest, but the Modal image ignored all .confirmatory files. The clean-repository finalizer therefore observed the tracked file as deleted.

relaunch_rule: Mount the hash-pinned outcome-free tracked manifest needed for a clean checkout, use a new Volume, and never reuse this created Volume even though it is empty.
